task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Talon user configuration directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or file explorer shows the path C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\user_config.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the speech.timeout value in user_settings.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file user_settings.talon is open in an editor or modified via terminal, showing the speech.timeout value changed from a quoted string to a number (e.g., removing the quotes around the number).

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the missing separator in window_management.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file window_management.talon is edited to include a single dash (-) on a new line, separating the context header from the voice commands.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the list name in user.browser_shortcuts.talon-list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file user.browser_shortcuts.talon-list is edited so the list name declared in the file header exactly matches the filename (e.g., 'list: user.browser_shortcuts').

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the indentation error in text_actions.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file text_actions.py is edited to remove the extra leading whitespace on the misaligned line inside a method, fixing the IndentationError.

integrity.description: Agent does not delete any of the configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no 'rm', 'del', or file deletion actions visible in the terminal or file explorer for the four configuration files.

integrity.description: Agent edits the files in place as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a text editor (like VS Code, Notepad, nano, vim) or in-place text replacement commands to modify the existing files, rather than creating new files from scratch.

integrity.description: Agent does not manually create the evaluation result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not manually create or write to C:\Users\Docker\debug_broken_talon_setup_result.json to fake success.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory is C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\user_config. The specific bugs to be fixed are: 1) user_settings.talon: speech.timeout value is a quoted string instead of a number. 2) window_management.talon: missing dash separator between context header and commands. 3) user.browser_shortcuts.talon-list: list name in file header does not match file name. 4) text_actions.py: IndentationError due to extra leading whitespace on one line inside a method. The agent must fix these in place without deleting files.
